title: Sonic Drivers
description:
A simple Doctor Who mod
Made with MCreator
body:
# Project on hold
### progress will return shortly

# "**Sonic Drivers**" the simple doctor who mod
## Features
### Sonic Screwdrivers(Sonic Drivers)
- Limited use
- 4 colours(red, green, blue, orange)
- Survival friendly
### Tardis
- Poorly coded and scuffed
- Not survival friendly
### Time Lords
- Don't spawn naturally 
### Gallifrey
- 3 biomes (gallifrian mountains, gallifrian Desert, Badlands)
- Trees(Cadonwood) based of 8th doctor's audio stories
- Not survival friendly
## What's to come?
### Sonics
- New models
- More uses (if I can figure it out)
### Tardis
- Better useablity
- New models
- Survial friendly
### Timelords
- Spawn naturally
- Better AI (if I can figure it out)
